FREAKY Mari bot...

I thought it was about time I made a new Mari bot seeing how my most popular ones bots are just Mari ones.

Though this time I gave the people what they wanted and made this one nsfw based, with this being an AU, where Mari survived and nothing too bad really happened. (Lazy ass excuse Ik)

In this one you completely replace Hero, Kel is your brother still and no real big changes take place besides you replacing Hero (or if you wanted just be Hero.)
